blockers.reason: Plan 003 cannot execute the 12 genuine BranchRuns or promote a Witness until the authoritative HUD QA reward-hacking classification API/command is bound. The installed HUD 0.6.4 CLI exposes eval/jobs/trace and the public docs describe QA Agents, but this repo has no checked-in command/API that returns same-branch reward-hacking verdicts.
